approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Next Repair Queue that ranks proposal-only pipeline repair moves from existing readbacks.
constraints: Do not create backlog cards, Scoper records, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, approval records, action routes, atoms, facts, synthesis rows, Harlan messages, model calls, extraction runs, connector probes, or external writes.
Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, auto-clear, or mutate live action routes.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations, repair proposals, source gaps, or next repair rows into backlog or Scoper.
Keep Scoper scheduling, route apply, model-backed synthesis, extraction, connector sync, and source writes as separate approval-bound cards.
Fail proof if any proposed repair is marked auto-created, applied, promoted, or no longer proposal-only.
